ddt:Target.Name: V4Y - 614A
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU V4Y HITACHI/NISSAN/V6 3,5l Software version 6147
AG
Last update 20/02/02

Data.Name: A catalyst Diag parameter for the GST output - GFCAT
A catalyst Diag parameter for the GST output - GFCAT+1
Accel pedal diagnosis info flag - FNGAPS
Back wind screen heating State_CLIM - LARCX
Boolean indicating codes has been learn - CODAPRI3
Boolean indicating eeprom vl3 failure - PPEEPVL3
Boolean indicating status is protected - ETAPRO
Both of brake sw present failure - PP2CFRE
